name: aws-lambda-crawler
description: AWS-Lambda function for crawling URLs to discover pages
author: T. Daniel

scripts.deploy: tsc && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r lambda.zip lambda.* > /dev/null && aws --profile equalifyuic lambda update-function-code --function-name aws-lambda-crawler --zip-file "fileb://lambda.zip" > /dev/null && rm -rf lambda.zip
